use_codes.desc: USE OF CU-64 DOTATATE WITH POSITRON EMISSION TOMOGRAPHY (PET) FOR LOCALIZATION OF SOMATOSTATIN RECEPTOR POSITIVE NEUROENDOCRINE TUMORS (NETS) IN ADULT PATIENTS

indications.text:
Detectnet is indicated for use with positron emission tomography (PET) for localization of somatostatin
receptor positive neuroendocrine tumors (NETs) in adult patients.
